name: Enchiladas De Pollo (Deluxe Chicken Enchiladas)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chicken broth from chicken breasts
Hot sauce or 1 large can tomatillos
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken breasts in a large pot or Dutch oven and cover with water.
2. Add onion, bay leaf, peppercorns, and salt to taste. Bring the mixture to a boil.
3. Simmer for about 45 minutes. Cool the chicken in the broth and reserve the broth for other uses.
4. Shred the chicken using a fork or fingers and mix it with chopped onion, Parmesan cheese, and half of the shredded Monterey Jack cheese. Season with salt if needed. Set aside.
5. In a blender or food processor, combine green chilies, tomatillos or hot sauce, cilantro, cream, egg, and broth. Blend until smooth and season with salt to taste.
6. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Heat lard or oil in a small skillet. Place one tortilla at a time into the hot oil for 3 to 5 seconds on each side until softened. Drain on paper towels.
8. Fill each tortilla with the chicken mixture, pressing it to make it compact. Roll tightly and place seam-side down in a baking dish.
9. Pour the chili mixture over the enchiladas and sprinkle cheese on top.
10. Bake for 20 minutes until heated through and bubbly. Serve with guacamole and sliced olives and shredded lettuce on top if desired.
